Summary: Initial deck analysis and Notion page structure created
Rationale: First structured review of Rocco's Secret. Established global Cards DB, Decision Log DB, and deck landing page format. All cards confirmed owned and populated into Cards DB with rarity, price, edition, and role.
Session Notes: Norin engine identified as primary value engine. Five key synergy lines documented. Maybeboard flagged Elesh Norn and Recruiter of the Guard as strongest potential upgrades. Deck confirmed fully owned, no proxies needed.

Summary: EDHREC analysis — upgrade strategy section added
Cards Affected: Aura Shards, Grand Abolisher, Path to Exile, Rose Room Treasurer, Temur Sabertooth, Ranger-Captain of Eos, Beast Within, Birthing Pod, Kiki-Jiki Mirror Breaker
Rationale: Pulled EDHREC recommendations for Rocco (9,032 decks). Cross-referenced against mainboard. Filtered out generic Naya staples and fast mana padding. Identified 3 priority adds: Aura Shards (answers Torpor Orb via Norin engine), Grand Abolisher (protects combo turns), Path to Exile over Reprieve. Kiki+Felidar combo noted as available but bracket-raising.
Session Notes: Birthing Pod and tutors flagged as bracket 4 territory — decision deferred to Brad. Fyndhorn Elves/Chrome Mox/Gaea's Cradle dismissed as power inflation without addressing actual weaknesses.

Summary: Initial deck analysis and Notion page structure created
Rationale: First structured review of Yedora the Explorer. 71/73 cards owned — need Cloudstone Curio ($15.59) and Blasting Station ($8.35). Full deck populated into Cards DB. EDHREC analysis completed against 2,929 decks.
Session Notes: Three combo lines documented: Quirion/Scryb/Wildebeests bounce loop, Temur Charger + Evolutionary Leap loop, Life and Limb + Sporemound. Top 3 adds: Sporemound (completes Life and Limb combo for $0.30), Ambush Commander (turns Forests into creatures), Kamahl's Will (instant board wipe). Maybeboard already contains Ambush Commander, Ashaya, Sporemound, Sylvan Safekeeper — all strong includes.

Summary: Legality check and recommended cuts added
Cards Affected: Vengeful Creeper, Culvert Ambusher, Garruk's Uprising, Living Lands, Fellwar Stone, Explore, Harmonize, Sutina, Speaker of the Tajuru
Rationale: Deck found to be 104 cards — 4 over the legal limit. No banned cards, colour violations, or duplicates. Recommended immediate cuts: Vengeful Creeper, Culvert Ambusher, Garruk's Uprising, Living Lands (all low synergy, free to cut). Swap candidates: Fellwar Stone → Dawntreader Elk ($0.25), Harmonize → Haywire Mite (owned), Explore → Sporemound (owned), Sutina → Ambush Commander ($3.01).
Session Notes: Total cost to implement all cuts and swaps: $3.26. Two replacements (Sporemound, Haywire Mite) are already owned. Living Lands flagged as having anti-synergy with Yedora — Forests becoming creatures can create unintended Yedora triggers.

Summary: Initial deck analysis — precon diff and page structure built
Cards Affected: 26 non-land cards added, 28 non-land cards removed vs official precon
Rationale: First structured analysis of Big Zurgs vs official Mardu Surge precon (deck 12020252). 26 non-land adds: key upgrades are Smothering Tithe ($52), Grim Tutor ($25), Ashnod's Altar ($14), Soul's Attendant ($9.51), Isshin Two Heavens as One, Cathars' Crusade, Toxic Deluge. Total added non-land cost ~$164. 25/26 owned — only Dollmaker's Shop (~$4.78) missing. Deck is 99 cards — needs 1 more to be legal. Sol Ring still present.
Session Notes: Primary win con identified as Isshin + Zurgo attack loop generating 6-10+ drain per attack via Mirkwood Bats, Zulaport Cutthroat, Bastion of Remembrance, Impact Tremors. Suggested fix: add Dollmaker's Shop (not owned, $4.78) to hit 100 cards while fitting the token strategy. Smothering Tithe is the dominant value add — worth flagging with table.
